# Woodcock Lane Dental Care

> High-quality private dentistry in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire. Est. 1986. Welcoming new patients. NHS care for children under 18.

## Business Summary

Woodcock Lane Dental Care is a well-established private dental practice located at 2 Woodcock Lane, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2EE. Founded in 1986 by Dr Robert Salvin, the practice has built a strong reputation for clinical excellence and patient-focused care. In March 2026, ownership passed to Tara Conway, a specialist prosthodontist with a Masters from King's College London.

## Services

- **General Dentistry**: Examinations, digital X-rays, hygienist appointments, white and silver fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, root canal treatment, extractions, sports mouthguards
- **Cosmetic Dentistry**: Tooth whitening (from £430), composite bonding, porcelain veneers, Emax metal-free crowns, smile assessments (free)
- **Dental Implants**: Single implants from £3,300, full arch restorations, Straumann and Ankylos systems, specialist implant dentist Guy Bailey
- **Orthodontics**: 35+ years experience, 3,000+ cases, fixed braces, tooth-coloured braces, invisible aligners, NHS for qualifying children, private from £2,400–£6,330
- **Children's Dentistry**: NHS care free for under-18s, purpose-built play area, star reward scheme, preventive advice

## Team

- **Tara Conway** — Owner & Lead Dentist, Masters in Prosthodontics (King's College London, Distinction 2022), GDC 177315
- **David Lyons** — Dentist, 35+ years orthodontic experience, 3,000+ cases
- **Sarah Fenton** — Dentist
- **Guy Bailey** — Implant Dentist (Straumann & Ankylos)
- **Lisa Law** — Dentist
- **Nicholas Brown** — Dentist
- **Carina Burgos, Sarah Davis, Laura Horton** — Dental Hygienists
- Jackie (Practice Manager), Karen, Sarah, Lesley (Receptionists), Liz (Administrator), plus 8 Dental Nurses

## Key Facts

- Private practice; NHS available for children under 18
- Member: British Dental Association Good Practice Scheme
- No joining fees or practice membership fees
- Denplan Essentials available from £26.45/month (2 exams + 2 hygiene + 2 X-rays per year)
- Digital X-ray equipment (minimal radiation)
- On-site defibrillator and emergency medical kit
- Purpose-built children's play area
- Own car park

## Contact & Hours

- **Address**: 2 Woodcock Lane, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2EE
- **Phone**: 01453 828327

- **Tuesday**: 8.30am–12.30pm, 1.30pm–5.00pm
- **Wednesday**: 8.30am–12.30pm, 2.00pm–5.30pm
- **Thursday**: 8.30am–12.30pm, 1.30pm–7.30pm
- **Friday**: 8.15am–12.30pm, 1.30pm–4.30pm
- **Saturday–Sunday**: Closed

## Coverage Area

Stonehouse, Stroud, Gloucester, Cheltenham, Bristol, South Gloucestershire and surrounding areas.
